summary:
Lucatumumab has not been shown to bind to CD140; current evidence indicates it lacks documented interactions with this receptor. No supporting references exist linking lucatumumab’s mechanism to CD140 targeting.  

(End of Round)

The summary must be strictly factual without adding interpretation beyond what was stated by Agent2.

Lucatumumab does not bind to CD140 according to the provided evidence. There is no documentation or indication that lucatumumab interacts with CD140.
